case_title: MULTIFAMILY TECHNOLOGY SOLUTIONS, IN. VS. NORTHWEST EXIT REALTY S A INC., et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-26-2011 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE DEC-17-2010 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
